TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2024. The Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 caps the copay for a one-month 
supply of insulin on any tier to $35 beginning in 2024. 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived
